form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind Canadian Lass at this track over 2040m in a 3yo+ NR 45 to 52 on April 1 at $34. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Stormtide at this track over 2040m in a 3yo+ NR 41 to 46 on April 8 at $2.10. Could break through aided by the inside draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a clear run at a vital stage in the home straight.
Broke gait leaving the first turn, galloping for some distance.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr4) over 1780m after being wide early at this track, beaten a head by Rightyo (2:12.30) in 3yo+ NR 47 to 54 on April 8 at $15. Draws well and has definite claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Led up the running line from 900m approximately.

form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when third at Marburg on April 5. Won the start before at Marburg on March 23. A good draw may see her hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Beaten favourite last start when third at Marburg on April 5. Won the start before at Marburg on March 23. A good draw may see her hard to beat.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 10th (Fr4) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 17 m by Warrawee Flyer (1:57.50) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 50 on April 7 at $13. Showed ability the run before when he won by a neck as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Albion Park (2:34.50) beating Royal Princess in 3yo+ NR up to 48 on March 31 at $2.70. Capable of more than he has shown recently. May bounce back.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 1780m at this track, beaten 12 m by Beer Money (2:10.50) in 3yo+ NR 47 to 54 on April 8 at $71. Two runs back won by 1.2 m (Sr3) at this track (2:10.40) beating Dipped In Silver in 3yo+ NR 40 to 44 on April 1 at $7. Might find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing fifth behind Sports Bounty at Albion Park over 2138m in a 3yo+ NR up to 48 on March 31 at $4.80. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.75 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Beer Money at this track over 1780m in a 3yo+ NR 47 to 54 on April 8 at $2.80. Shapes as one to consider.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted ground contacting Little Surfer Girl leaving the 200m.
Broke in the score up and was out of position at the candy pole.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 13 m by Warrawee Flyer (1:57.50) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 50 on April 7 at $41. Two runs back 4th (Sr1) over 2138m at Albion Park, beaten 5.5 m by Sports Bounty (2:34.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 48 on March 31 at $6. This looks a far sterner test.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up and inconvenienced behind the weakening Sports Bounty leaving the 300m.
Held up for clear running over the concluding stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr2) over 1780m at this track, beaten 23 m by Miki Moo (2:08.40) in Up to 1 LTW on April 1 at $16. Two runs back 5th (Fr2) over 2040m at this track, beaten 17 m by Lucky Luda (2:30.50) in Up to 1 LTW on March 25 at $7.50. Needs to do more. Has the task ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly for a short distance leaving the 1400m point of the event.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Miss Froufrou at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 30 at $5.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind The Rizzler at Albion Park over 2138m in a 3yo+ NR 51 to 60 on April 7 at $14. Go well again.

form.formComment: Has won at her last two outings. Last start won by 2.25 m as favourite (Fr1) at Albion Park (1:57.50) beating Western Bill in 3yo+ NR 43 to 50 on April 7 at $3. Hard to leave out on current form. Chance for a hat trick of wins.
